sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19461" key="barupaqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρυ-πᾰθέω</orth>, <sense id="n19461.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be much annoyed,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.167f</biblScope> </bibl>(v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
